repos.name: ai-beauty-analysis
repos.description: Real-time facial analysis web app using Flask, OpenCV, and MediaPipe with smile detection and personalized feedback.

repos.name: gesture-recognition
repos.description: Browser-native hand gesture recognition using TensorFlow.js HandPose model with text-to-speech output.

repos.name: iot-esp32-projects
repos.description: Collection of IoT prototypes with ESP32 and Raspberry Pi — sensor logging, MQTT integration, and home automation.

repos.name: fitness-analysis
repos.description: Body posture and fitness scoring app using MediaPipe BlazePose model with joint angle computation.
